schedule.description: Game recap — Pirates 12, Cubs 1, 10-game losing streak
Bold take — 21-4 to 29-26, the math makes no sense
NL Central standings — Cubs 3rd, Brewers 4+ up
Game preview — Taillon vs Chandler, 5:40 PM CT
Paul Skenes tomorrow — series finale stakes

stories.title: Pirates 12, Cubs 1 — Losing Streak Reaches 10
stories.angle: Game 2 recap; Wicks surrendered 5 ER in 1st inning of return; 1-for-13 RISP; 11 LOB; 2 total runs in 2 games; 10th straight loss, longest since 2022; Cubs 29-26

x_posts.label: Post 1A
x_posts.text:
Pirates 12, Cubs 1.

Wicks surrendered 5 runs in the 1st inning of his return. The Cubs went 1-for-13 with runners in scoring position and left 11 on base — just 2 total runs across two games.

Ten straight losses. Longest skid since 2022.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: The Math on This Cubs Season Makes No Sense
stories.angle: Cubs started 21-4, are now 29-26 with a 10-game losing streak — went 8-22 since their peak; same roster, no blockbuster trades, no explanation; unprecedented season arc

x_posts.label: Post 2A
x_posts.text:
The Cubs started this season 21-4.

They are now 29-26 — 8-22 since that peak. No blockbuster trade, no lineup overhaul. Just the same roster and a 10-game slide that makes no statistical sense.

Only in baseball. Only the Cubs could do this.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

stories.title: NL Central Freefall — Cubs Now Trailing Brewers by 4+ Games
stories.angle: Cubs 29-26, 3rd in NL Central; Brewers 31-20+, 4+ game lead; Cardinals between them; Cubs dropped from 1st to 3rd in a matter of weeks

x_posts.label: Post 3A
x_posts.text:
Cubs were in 1st in the NL Central three weeks ago.

They're 29-26 now — 3rd — with the Brewers (31-20+) holding a 4+ game lead and the Cardinals sitting between them. Ten games will do that.

Brewers getting fat off Cubs misery is peak NL Central.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Game Preview — Taillon vs Chandler, 5:40 PM CT
stories.angle: Taillon (5.20 ERA, 17 HR allowed) vs Chandler (1-6, 4.79 ERA, 34 BB in 47 IP); Cubs desperately need to end 10-game slide; Chandler's command issues are the opening; 5:40 PM CT at PNC Park

x_posts.label: Post 4A
x_posts.text:
Taillon vs Chandler. 5:40 PM CT, PNC Park.

Cubs desperately need to end the 10-game slide. Chandler (1-6, 4.79 ERA) has walked 34 batters in 47 innings — command issues the lineup can exploit. Taillon (5.20 ERA) has to give them a chance.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Paul Skenes Tomorrow — Series Ends With the Best Arm in Baseball
stories.angle: Skenes 6-2, 1.98 ERA, 0.714 WHIP (leads MLB), 56 K in 50 IP; Cubs scored 2 runs total in Games 1 and 2; Colin Rea vs Skenes in Game 4 (Thursday 5:40 PM CT); nightmare series finale

x_posts.label: Post 5A
x_posts.text:
Paul Skenes pitches the series finale tomorrow at 5:40 PM CT.

His 2026 line: 6-2, 1.98 ERA, 0.714 WHIP (leads MLB), 56 K in 50 innings. The Cubs have scored 2 runs in the first two games of this series.

That's the math on Thursday. Rea vs Skenes.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
